sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40208" key="e)pimh/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμήλιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n40208.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">guardian of flocks</tr_>, epith. of Apollo at Camirus, Macrob.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:17:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17.45</biblScope> </bibl>; of Hermes at Coronea, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:34:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.34.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
